message:
feat(fm-core): add epoch-based concurrent IR handle

Introduces `EpochIrHandle` and `IrSnapshot` in a new `epoch` module,
providing lock-free concurrent reads of `MermaidDiagramIr` while layout
computation operates on a snapshot. Safe-Rust Arc+RwLock implementation
with monotonic epoch counter and automatic reclamation. Registers the
module in lib.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
